/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/flow_collector.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flow_collector.dir/src/model/NormalizedFlow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flow_collector.dir/src/sinks/HttpSink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flow_collector.dir/src/collectors/FakeCollector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flow_collector.dir/src/collectors/FileCollector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flow_collector.dir/src/parsers/ZeekParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flow_collector.dir/src/parsers/SuricataParser.cpp.o  -o flow_collector  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Network.so.5.12.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.12.8
